slow_internet.solution: Try restarting your router and checking your connection settings.

app_crashing.symptom: The app keeps crashing on startup.
app_crashing.solution: Update the app to the latest version and restart your device.

account_upgrade.symptom: I have no access to bunch of services here.
account_upgrade.solution: You have to pay for the access get the access to the services.

forgotten_password.solution: Click on the hyperlink called 'Reset my password' and provide your email.

resign_subscription.symptom: How can I resign from my subscribtion?
resign_subscription.solution: Select: 'Profile' --> 'myaccount' --> 'billings', and there 'Resign from the subscribtion'.
